phases.name: Scaffold project structure
phases.description: Create .agent/, opencode.json, AGENTS.md, .gitignore, .gitattributes, docs/, resources/, git init.

phases.name: Direction + Utils + Robot (abstract) + Visualizer
phases.description: Create Direction enum, Utils static methods, Robot abstract handle base, Visualizer wireframe renderer.

phases.name: DifferentialDrive + DynamicsEngine
phases.description: Create DifferentialDrive robot (3-DOF planar) and DynamicsEngine (RK4 integrator).

phases.name: Controller + startRobot.m
phases.description: Create Controller (keyboard handler, real-time loop) and startRobot.m entry point for DifferentialDrive.

phases.name: Quadcopter + AerialRobot
phases.description: Create AerialRobot abstract (full 6-DOF) and Quadcopter (rotor thrust/torque model).

phases.name: Refactor GroundRobot abstract
phases.description: Create GroundRobot abstract base, reparent DifferentialDrive from Robot to GroundRobot.

phases.name: Quadruped body dynamics + leg geometry
phases.description: Create Quadruped with 6-DOF trunk dynamics, 3-link leg geometry, spring-damper ground contact.

phases.name: Quadruped IK + leg animation
phases.description: Implement analytic IK for 3-link legs, animate legs synchronised to body motion.

phases.name: Quadruped trot gait + full keyboard control
phases.description: Implement trot gait (diagonal leg pairs), integrate with Controller for interactive control.

phases.name: Polish: physics tuning, visual refinements, edge cases
phases.description: Tune physics parameters, refine wireframe visuals, handle edge cases, final testing.

phases.name: Humanoid body dynamics + leg geometry
phases.description: Create Humanoid with 6-DOF trunk dynamics, 2-link bipedal leg geometry, spring-damper ground contact.

phases.name: Humanoid IK + bipedal walking gait
phases.description: Implement analytic IK for 2-link bipedal legs, walking gait with balance control.

phases.name: Humanoid full keyboard control + integration
phases.description: Integrate Humanoid with Controller, update startRobot.m, full keyboard control for walking.
